purpose: Define the fail-closed contract for converting internal computed artifacts into provisional or validated W and Z vector-boson mass-mode records.

forbiddenInputs.reason: External targets are comparison data only and cannot source computed mode values or identity.

examples: select candidate closest to PDG W mass
select candidate closest to PDG Z mass
select candidate ratio closest to PDG W/Z ratio
forbiddenInputs.reason: W/Z identity must be derived from internal representation, symmetry, and selector-matched evidence, not target agreement.

requiredInputs.closureRequirement: Provide individual computed W and Z mode candidates from internal artifacts.
Derive charged weak-vector and neutral weak-vector identities without using mass proximity to PDG values.
Estimate all uncertainty components for each mode and propagate the ratio uncertainty.
All mode, evidence, mapping, calibration, and observable records must agree on selectors or emit blocked records.

outputRecords.validationGate: validated requires selector-matched validated identity evidence and complete nonnegative uncertainty.
validated requires internally checkable derivation ids, source observables, symmetry content, and representation content.

failClosedRules.result: emit blocked W and Z candidate records or keep existing provisional placeholders inactive

failClosedRules.condition: identity evidence is absent, provisional, ambiguous, or target-derived
failClosedRules.result: block promotion of mode records, mapping, calibration, and physical claim

failClosedRules.condition: any required mode or ratio uncertainty component is negative or absent
failClosedRules.result: block ratio extraction for physical prediction

failClosedRules.condition: W and Z candidates do not share branch, environment, refinement, unit family, and validated evidence selectors
failClosedRules.result: block extraction and record selector closure requirements

failClosedRules.condition: any relevant active fatal or high falsifier remains unresolved
failClosedRules.result: block physical claim language even if a numerical ratio can be computed

closureRequirements: Generate individual W and Z mode candidates from internal computed sources.
Add W/Z mode-identification derivations independent of external target agreement.
Estimate mode and ratio uncertainty budgets.
Promote mapping and calibration only after evidence and uncertainty validate.
Resolve or explicitly carry severe falsifiers through the claim gate.
